title: Katechon Technology
description: Katechon Technology pitch cut for Dune Ventures.

visuals.prompt: Cinematic 16:9 dashboard header for the Katechon Technology fundraise deck: live software channels arranged like a premium media control room, luminous application surfaces, avatar narration energy suggested through abstract signal waves, dark full-bleed investor demo aesthetic, refined red ember and emerald signal accents, no readable text, no logos, no watermark

slides.headline: Live software becomes the next media object.
slides.line: Channels people can watch, scroll, and eventually act inside.
slides.narration: AI is making software surfaces abundant. Katechon turns live state into channels people can watch, scroll, and eventually act inside.
slides.visualPrompt: Cinematic investor deck hero image for a new media format: a dark full-bleed live software feed floating in space, multiple luminous application dashboards as channels, maps, event rooms, agent timelines, market pulse panels, game-state overlays, elegant red and green signal accents, premium interactive media aesthetic, deep black background, sharp glass UI, no readable text, no logos, no watermark, 16:9 composition

slides.headline: A dashboard with the grammar of interactive media.
slides.narration: This is not dashboard SaaS. A live surface has state like a game, a narrator like a streamer, and a feed like consumer media.
slides.visualPrompt: A high-end interactive media cockpit that feels half dashboard, half game spectator mode: live map surface, avatar narration presence represented as an abstract glowing voice core, feed tiles, game-like state indicators, cinematic dark interface, red orange accent, emerald signal lights, premium venture deck visual, no readable text, no logos, no watermark, 16:9

slides.headline: YouTube streams video. Katechon streams software state.
slides.narration: Video flattens the surface. Katechon keeps the underlying object structured, inspectable, personalized, and eventually actionable.
slides.visualPrompt: Abstract split between flat video pixels and structured software state: left side dissolving into video scanlines, right side clean inspectable data objects, nodes, panels, live application state layers, cinematic black environment, crisp technical realism, red blue green accents, sophisticated investor presentation visual, no readable text, no logos, no watermark, 16:9

slides.headline: Own the software feed.
slides.line: Websites, photos, and short-form video made their biggest fortunes at discovery. Katechon learns which model, prompt, state, and intent combinations become software channels people want.
slides.imageAlt: A cinematic software feed control plane connecting frontier model cores to live software channels and audience signals.
slides.narration: Every new content format created the same prize. Google owned discovery for websites. Instagram owned discovery for photos. TikTok owned discovery for short-form video. As people use Katechon, we learn which models, prompts, tools, state, and user intents combine into software worth watching and using. Own that discovery graph, and we become the way the world finds software.
slides.visualPrompt: Wide cinematic investor deck background, not an infographic. A colossal black-glass recommendation engine floats in deep space, routing luminous streams from frontier-model energy cores into thousands of live software-channel constellations. Abstract feed-era motifs appear only as unlabeled energy shapes: a red link mesh, a blue tile cloud, and amber vertical light columns. The whole scene feels like owning the algorithmic layer between models and users. Deep scale, crisp technical realism, premium dark environment, refined red ember, emerald signal, blue intelligence, amber opportunity accents. No captions, no typography, no readable UI, no logos, no people, no faces, 16:9 composition
